hooks.prompt:
Analyze the conversation that just ended. Identify NEW knowledge worth storing — corrections from the user, stated preferences, principles articulated, or patterns you observed but never recorded. For each item:
- type: rule | observation | preference | procedure
- trust: principle (user explicitly stated, include quote) | pattern (you observed) | inference (your guess — use sparingly)
- include quote when trust=principle (exact user words)

Before storing, call search_memory to dedup — don't re-store existing knowledge.

Emit a single <auto-capture> block listing items to store. The main session will be re-invoked with stop_hook_active=true to execute the store_knowledge calls. If nothing worth storing, emit <auto-capture-skip/>.

Don't store: trivial chat, one-off task progress, ephemeral state.
